panels.description: Wide shot: A towering, scarred silhouette of the Creature looking at a tattered map in a dark, moonlight-streaked forest, eyes reflecting a longing for Geneva.

bubbles.text: You were my father, my creator. I learned your home was Geneva, and there I resolved to go.

panels.description: Medium shot: The Creature trudging through a frozen, desolate winter landscape. Heavy snow falls, sharp jagged icicles in the background, deep shadows, cinematic atmosphere.

bubbles.text: The earth was hard and chill. I traveled only by night, a monster fleeing his own existence.

panels.description: Close-up: The Creature's face, eyes burning with internal rage and bitterness, snow melting on his monstrous, scarred features, intense dramatic lighting.

bubbles.text: The nearer I approached, the more revenge enkindled in my heart.

panels.description: Medium shot: The Creature standing in a sunlit spring forest, looking up at the light, a single tear running down his cheek, feeling a rare moment of gentleness.

bubbles.text: But with the spring, my gentleness revived. I dared to walk beneath the sun.

panels.description: Wide shot: The Creature hidden in the shadows of a deep cypress tree near a rapid river. A young girl is seen playfully running towards the river's edge, unaware of the danger as she slips.

bubbles.text: I paused at the river. Then, I heard her laughter—suddenly cut short by a fall.
